tagline: Gentle chiropractic care for Sebastopol's families and athletes
seoDescription: Impulse Life Chiropractic in Sebastopol, CA. Dr. Kendell Jack offers gentle, personalized adjustments for families, athletes, and all ages. Book online today.
heroHeading: Restore movement, balance, and your body's natural ability to heal
heroSubheading: Dr. Kendell Jack provides gentle, personalized chiropractic adjustments in Sebastopol — caring for everyone from newborns to seniors.
highlights: Care for all ages — newborns to seniors
Spine, nervous system, and extremity care
aboutBody: Impulse Life Chiropractic is led by Dr. Kendell Jack, DC, a Doctor of Chiropractic dedicated to helping Sebastopol's families and athletes live healthier, more connected lives. After years of study and a vision for a true healing space, Dr. Jack opened his own clinic in Sebastopol to deliver care that supports the body's natural ability to thrive.

His approach centers on gentle, personalized adjustments that restore balance in the spine and nervous system, allowing the body to function at its best and heal naturally. Dr. Jack has had the privilege of working with people of all ages — from newborns to seniors — and also focuses on extremity care for the feet, ankles, and knees, because lasting movement starts at the ground.
servicesHeading: How we help you move and feel better

services.title: Chiropractic Adjustments
services.description: Gentle, personalized spinal adjustments that restore balance to the spine and nervous system, helping your body function at its best and heal naturally.

services.title: Extremity Adjusting
services.description: Care for the feet, ankles, and knees — because movement starts at the ground. Hands-on adjusting to keep you mobile and balanced from the floor up.

services.title: Athlete & Sports Care
services.description: Chiropractic support built for active bodies, helping Sebastopol's athletes recover, move better, and stay in the game.

services.title: Family Chiropractic
services.description: Personalized care for the whole family, working with people of all ages from newborns to seniors in a welcoming, family-focused practice.

services.title: Nervous System & Wellness Care
services.description: Ongoing adjustments that support a balanced nervous system, helping you feel more connected, vibrant, and empowered in daily life.

services.title: New Patient Exams
services.description: A thorough first visit to understand your body and goals, so your care plan is tailored to you. New patients welcome — book your visit online.

notes: VERIFIED: Chiropractor is Dr. Kendell (Desmond) Jack, DC — CA General Chiropractic license #37361, accepting new patients (Healthgrades, orthopedic.io). Practice located at 7765 Healdsburg Ave, Sebastopol CA. Recently founded — Dr. Jack graduated as a DC after ~3.5 years of study and ran a 2025 GoFundMe ('Help Dr. Kendell Jack Open a Wellness Clinic') to launch the Sebastopol clinic, so 'established' set to 2025 (approx, based on the 2025 fundraiser and new-practice listings). Listed with Sebastopol Chamber of Commerce. Uses JaneApp booking (impulselifechiropractic.janeapp.com — returned 403 to fetch). Active on Facebook + Instagram (@_impulse__life). PHILOSOPHY/TECHNIQUE: gentle, personalized adjustments to restore spine/nervous-system balance; emphasis on families, athletes, all ages (newborns to seniors); extremity adjusting (feet/ankles/knees) confirmed via Instagram posts ('Movement starts at the ground. We adjust the feet, ankles, knees', '#chirojack'). UNVERIFIED — do NOT assert: no rating/reviews exist yet (Healthgrades shows 'Be the first to review'); no published hours found; specific named technique (Gonstead/Activator/Diversified) and DC school not confirmed; explicit prenatal/pediatric service not stated though 'newborns to seniors' and 'families' are. NOTE: a second listed phone 707-823-3113 appears on Healthgrades vs the lead's (707) 806-3989 — kept the lead's number. No clearly-theirs photos downloadable (social/JaneApp blocked), so realPhotoUrls empty.
